title: Fix viewer page overlap in stack
description:
PDF Viewer stacked pages no longer overlap. Stack Y spacing now uses layout display height (p.h after width unify) instead of unscaled PDF footprint height, which was too short when viewDispScale > 1.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg79).
changeLog: Stack spacing uses p.h layout box, not footprint.h.
World bounds and fit width use layout box dimensions.
H13 stack overlap diagnostics. Cache bust dbg79.
